text: reasons stated in the accompanying affidavit, the Petitioner/Plaintiff prays that the honorable court may be pleased to pass order by way of an ex-parte injunction order by dispensing with the service of notice to the Respondents/Defendants for restraining the defendants, their men or agents not to interfere with the peaceful possession and enjoyment of plaint schedule property except due process of law.; while pending disposal of the main suit, and to pass such other orders as the Honourable Court deems fit and proper in the circumstances of the petition and in the interest of justice.
